column_lineage.description: Column-level lineage is computed at runtime by AdvancedLineageEngine.build() which iterates ColumnMapping objects per job, resolves SOURCE→tMap→TARGET flows via lineage_graph_builder.build_graph(), merges per-job LineageGraphs into a repository-wide graph via repository_lineage_index.build_repository_index(), and adds cross-job bridge edges between nodes sharing the same database.schema.table physical identity. Transformation types (mapping, expression, aggregation, join, lookup, filter) are classified by TransformationIntelligence.extract(). Forward/backward traversal uses lineage_traversal.trace_forward/trace_backward().
column_lineage.physical_resolution: PhysicalTableRef from source_target_extractor resolves component names to database.schema.table
column_lineage.cross_job_bridging: repository_lineage_index links nodes sharing database.schema.table across jobs
